name: code_scanning_alerts
description:
Retrieves GitHub code scanning alerts (SARIF findings) for a repository — results from tools like CodeQL, Semgrep, or other SAST tools integrated via GitHub Actions. Requires GitHub connector token with 'security_events' or 'repo' scope.
Use when: user asks about code scanning results, CodeQL findings, SARIF alerts, or GitHub Actions security scan results on a remote repo.
Scope: remote GitHub API only — requires GITHUB_TOKEN.
Not for: local secret scanning (use repo_scanner), Dependabot package vulnerabilities (use dependabot_alerts), or local dependency auditing (use dependency_audit).

tool_name.description: Filter by scanning tool name. Example: 'CodeQL', 'Semgrep'. Optional — omit to return alerts from all tools.
